title: microsorum ithycarpum
intro: Microsorum ithycarpum, also known as the Water Fern or Tropical Water Fern, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, Microsorum ithycarpum has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and even acting as an antiseptic to prevent infection. The plant can be prepared as a tea by steeping the leaves in hot water or as a poultice by crushing the leaves and applying them directly to the affected area.
